inputs.value: A high-quality studio photograph of a simple and neat, with exactly 10 to 30 glass pieces, physical handcrafted stained glass suncatcher representing a cute friendly ghost wearing a classic witch hat. The ghost body is made of creamy white opalescent glass, with its wavy "arms" and bottom folds crafted from translucent light grey and pale taupe glass. The witch hat features shades of rich deep purple and lighter lavender translucent glass. The design has smooth, flowing lines, perfect for easy cutting, isolated on a plain crisp solid white background. Constructed from gorgeous pieces of textured translucent colored glass. All glass segments are bound by thick, continuous, smooth dark solder copper foil joints that completely partition the design into closed cells representing real pieces of glass, with absolutely no loose lines, no hanging lines, and no impossible narrow cuts. Designed for realistic physical glass cutting and assembly. Designed for extremely smooth easy-to-cut outlines, smooth easily-cut solder joints, no narrow shapes, no complex jigsaw lines, realistic glass fabrication template (no impossible sharp inner angles, no tiny pieces).
